---
title: "fp_enrich"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `fp_enrich()`

Enrich a Tibble with Resolved Names

## Usage

```r
fp_enrich(.data, id_col = NULL, name_col = "name", token = "FLIX_PATROL")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.data` | A data frame or tibble. |
| `id_col` | Tidy-select. The column containing FlixPatrol IDs. If not supplied, the function searches for the first column whose values start with '"cmp_"', '"ttl_"', or '"frn_"'. |
| `name_col` | Character. Name of the new column (default '"name"'). |
| `token` | Character. API environment variable name. |

## Value

The input tibble with an additional column of resolved names.

## Description

Pipe-friendly helper that detects a column of FlixPatrol IDs (mixed 'cmp_',
'ttl_', 'frn_' prefixes) and appends a 'name' column with the resolved
human-readable names.
